name: 3.04-reset-local-docker-pg
description: Stop and remove local PostgreSQL Docker container used for test data workflows
agent: agent
model: GPT-5.3-Codex (copilot)
---

# Reset Local Docker PostgreSQL Container

Stop and remove the local PostgreSQL Docker container that was used for test data import workflows.

## Context
Default container from prompt 2.02 is:
- `test-container`

## Task
1. Check whether the target container exists.
2. If running, stop the container.
3. Remove the container.
4. Verify the container no longer exists.

## Commands (Reference)
```pwsh
docker ps -a --filter "name=^/test-container$" --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"
docker stop test-container
docker rm test-container
docker ps -a --filter "name=^/test-container$" --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"
```

## Safety Requirements
- Do not delete unrelated containers.
- If the container does not exist, report a no-op success.
- If the container is already stopped, proceed directly to removal.

## Success Criteria
- `test-container` is stopped (if it was running).
- `test-container` is removed from Docker.
- Final verification confirms no matching container exists.
